Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. A Decade of Slug 495 upvotes, 43 comments
  2. Show HN: Fatal Core Dump – A debugging murder mystery played with GDB 40 upvotes, 1 comments
  3. A tale about fixing eBPF spinlock issues in the Linux kernel 37 upvotes, 1 comments
  4. More than 135 open hardware devices flashable with your own firmware 83 upvotes, 8 comments
  5. Mistral AI Releases Forge 198 upvotes, 29 comments
  6. Torturing Rustc by Emulating HKTs 55 upvotes, 6 comments
  7. Unsloth Studio 209 upvotes, 47 comments
  8. Show HN: Sub-millisecond VM sandboxes using CoW memory forking 83 upvotes, 15 comments
  9. Kagi Small Web 718 upvotes, 197 comments
  10. Launch HN: Kita (YC W26) – Automate credit review in emerging markets 33 upvotes, 5 comments
  11. Microsoft's 'unhackable' Xbox One has been hacked by 'Bliss' 593 upvotes, 215 comments
  12. Edge.js: Run Node apps inside a WebAssembly sandbox 111 upvotes, 33 comments
  13. Electron microscopy shows 'mouse bite' defects in semiconductors 36 upvotes, 8 comments
  14. Python 3.15's JIT is now back on track 309 upvotes, 124 comments
  15. The pleasures of poor product design 42 upvotes, 11 comments
  16. It Took Me 30 Years to Solve This VFX Problem – Green Screen Problem [video] 191 upvotes, 82 comments
  17. OpenSUSE Kalpa 185 upvotes, 81 comments
  18. Why AI systems don't learn – On autonomous learning from cognitive science 50 upvotes, 17 comments
  19. Launch an autonomous AI agent with sandboxed execution in 2 lines of code 18 upvotes, 4 comments
  20. Ryugu asteroid samples contain all DNA and RNA building blocks 209 upvotes, 104 comments
  21. Get Shit Done: A meta-prompting, context engineering and spec-driven dev system 245 upvotes, 132 comments
  22. 'The Secret Agent': Exploring a Vibrant, yet Violent Brazil (2025) 133 upvotes, 67 comments
  23. Show HN: I built an interactive 3D three-body problem simulator in the browser 35 upvotes, 14 comments
  24. The Starving Time in Jamestown 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  25. Java 26 is here 205 upvotes, 167 comments
  26. Node.js needs a virtual file system 237 upvotes, 204 comments
  27. Arno's Engram Keyboard Layouts 8 upvotes, 2 comments
  28. Leviathan 4 upvotes, 1 comments
  29. Honda is killing its EVs 245 upvotes, 534 comments
  30. Spice Data (YC S19) Is Hiring a Product Specialist 0 upvotes, 0 comments
